arts.ttl: Aston Villa demands, ten Hag & injuries - Full Unai Emery press conference ahead of Man Utd clash - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: After we played on Wednesday, a fantastic day, the supporters are very happy, but now I want to win on Sunday." Manchester United have quality players and the club is like others we are playing in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Ratcliffe breaks silence on Ten Hag's Man Utd future
arts.sum: Manchester United co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe has refused to back Erik ten Hag amid the Dutchman’s uncertain future at Old Trafford. When asked if Ten Hag will remain at the club for the foreseeable future, Ratcliffe told BBC Sport : “I don’t want to answer that question…I like Erik.

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Man Utd to make unexpected call regarding head coach
arts.sum: As previously revealed, current assistant manager Ruud van Nistelrooy was lined up to take over from Ten Hag once he had familiarised himself with the job if his compatriot did not achieve his targets by the end of the season. We understand that it was Ineos who wanted Van Nistelrooy and it wasn't someone Ten Hag asked for.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery promises to show struggling Manchester United no mercy ahead of Erik ten Hag's make-or-break trip to Aston Villa - as he urges side not to 'relax' after historic Bayern Munich win
arts.sum: TOM COLLOMOSSE: Unai Emery (left) has urged Aston Villa to show no mercy against Manchester United with their beleaguered boss Erik ten Hag (inset) facing an uncertain future.

arts.ttl: 'Struggled really badly': Owen Hargreaves says Aston Villa could have a field day against £43m Man United player
arts.sum: Aston Villa will fancy their chances against Manchester United in their Premier League meeting at Villa Park this Sunday. Villa go into the 2pm kick-off...

arts.ttl: National media pity 'tragic' Erik ten Hag in most damning Man United verdict yet after Porto draw
arts.sum: Manchester United face another tough test when they take on Aston Villa at Villa Park in the Premier League this weekend

arts.ttl: Rasmus Hojlund speaks out after infuriating fans on social media following Man United's disappointing 3-3 draw with Porto... and asks supporters to 'move on' ahead of Sunday's clash with Aston Villa
arts.sum: Rasmus Hojlund has responded to furious Manchester United fans after an Instagram post in the wake of the team's 3-3 draw against Porto on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Simone Inzaghi rejects chance to replace Erik ten Hag
arts.sum: Inter Milan boss Simone Inzaghi has reportedly turned down the chance to replace Erik ten Hag as Manchester United head coach. That is according to Italian journalist Tancredi Palmeri, who has revealed that Man Utd offered Inzaghi the chance to replace Ten Hag with immediate effect during the October international break.

arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe gives worrying seven-word response when asked if he has faith in Erik ten Hag to turn Man United around - but says it's NOT his decision on whether to sack the manager
arts.sum: Sir Jim Ratcliffe has broken his silence on the future of Erik ten Hag, claiming it is not his call whether the Dutchman remains as Manchester United manager.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag has run out of excuses - his time as Man Utd boss could end at Villa Park
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag's excuses sounded hollow after Manchester United put in yet another chaotic and disorganised performance against Porto - his departure is now inevitable
